# DGV Company

> DGV Company is a printing and packaging manufacturer based in Mumbai, India, delivering rigid boxes, corrugated packaging, paper bags, labels, commercial printing and branded corporate stationery.

DGV Company serves FMCG, pharmaceutical, food & beverage, personal care and industrial brands with precision printing and packaging solutions trusted across 10+ countries, backed by ISO 9001:2015 certification.

## Products
- [Products overview](https://www.dgvcompany.com/products): Rigid boxes, paper bags, corrugated boxes, labels, calendars & diaries, commercial printing and marketing collateral.

## Solutions
- [Solutions overview](https://www.dgvcompany.com/solutions): Offset, web offset, flexographic, digital and screen printing, plus conversion, fabrication and binding.

## Services
- [Value-added services](https://www.dgvcompany.com/value-added-services): Label design, packaging development, prototype sampling, bulk manufacturing, inventory management, logistics, visualisation and artwork archiving.

## Company
- [Clientele](https://www.dgvcompany.com/affiliations): Industries and brands DGV Company serves.
- Contact: abhinav@dgvcompany.com | +91 98207 91155 | Mumbai, India
